findings.verdict: Orphaned snapshot — source volume is deleted, storing 2050.4 GB with no active purpose

3. Or remove from Terraform state and run terraform apply:
   terraform state rm aws_ebs_snapshot.ebs-snapshot-v8jz50
4. Automate: enable AWS Data Lifecycle Manager or use a Lambda to clean up
   snapshots whose source volumes no longer exist.

findings.remediation:
1. Verify no AMI references this snapshot:
   aws ec2 describe-images --filters Name=block-device-mapping.snapshot-id,Values=<snapshot-id>
2. Delete via AWS CLI:
   aws ec2 delete-snapshot --snapshot-id <snapshot-id>
3. Or remove from Terraform state and run terraform apply:
   terraform state rm aws_ebs_snapshot.ebs-snapshot-qrgaus
4. Automate: enable AWS Data Lifecycle Manager or use a Lambda to clean up
   snapshots whose source volumes no longer exist.
